description_long: This object is a stylized, blocky representation of a laptop computer with a prominent rectangular screen and a thick, angular base. The screen displays a simplified user interface with a grid of black rectangles and a colored bar at the top, suggesting an open application or file manager. The body is primarily dark gray with lighter gray accents, and the keyboard area is depicted as a solid black rectangle with a lighter touchpad area. The back of the screen features a pixelated 'DELL' logo in light gray, adding a distinctive branding element. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible buttons, ports, or hinges, and the edges are sharply defined. The asset appears to be constructed from solid, matte materials, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance.
description: A blocky, stylized laptop computer with a dark gray body, a pixelated 'DELL' logo on the back, and a simple user interface displayed on the screen. The design is minimalist with sharp edges and no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with a grid-like user interface and a dark keyboard area below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the screen and base, with no visible details on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large, pixelated 'DELL' logo centered on the back of the screen.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the angular profile and lack of side features.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, angular, and uniformly dark gray, with sharp corners and no decorative elements or color contrast. It frames the display area with a solid, matte appearance.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is integrated into a flat, rectangular laptop base with no separate stand or visible adjustability features. The base is solid and matches the color and material of the bezel.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any edge or surface of the monitor.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, pixelated 'DELL' logo is present on the center of the rear panel of the screen, rendered in light gray blocks.
